notes: This is the first machine-readable core package for pre-code readiness.
The package freezes minimum stable contracts and is intended to be extended in later rounds rather than replaced.
Any implementation must consume these catalogs without creating a second vocabulary.
Shared state families are allowed only when semantic ownership remains explicit and single-sourced.
metadata.scope: minimum stable enums required by schema/rule/gate catalogs

enums.description: Values pending confirmation from docs; no machine assets found.
Controlled exception family scope
enums.semantic_notes: C-group frozen enum; controls governed exception family and its allowed scope; does not bypass L0 boundary, dual gates, or release gates.
decision_rules: exception_scope selects the approval chain and exception policy family; controlled_exception_record is mandatory.
scope may only limit, defer, restrict or allow within gated scope; it cannot promote D-tier or bypass dual gates.
scope impact must be reflected in delivery_matrix and field_policy_dictionary before any release.
mapping_notes: COVERAGE_HOLD -> approval_chain: boundary_exception; affects coverage_registry and coverage_promotion_release gate.
DELIVERY_RELEASE -> approval_chain: boundary_exception; affects delivery_matrix/release_gates only within approved scope.
GOVERNED_SUPPLEMENT_IMPACT -> approval_chain: governed_supplement_release; affects governed_supplement_record usable_scope/release_state.
CONTACT_RESTRICTION -> approval_chain: high_restriction_contact_release; affects contact_target/outreach_plan; does not change field_class.
OTHER -> requires explicit scope, duration and rollback_plan; cannot be used as a blanket bypass.

example_cases.decision: hold coverage promotion and block leadpack release
example_cases.expected_effect: coverage_sellable_state remains VALIDATING; release gates remain BLOCK

example_cases.decision: allow limited leadpack delivery for approved objects
example_cases.expected_effect: delivery_matrix allows summary fields only with audit and approval

example_cases.scenario: governed supplement reviewed for impact eligibility
example_cases.decision: usable_scope set to REVIEW_ONLY; no external exposure
example_cases.expected_effect: governed supplement content stays isolated; delivery uses metadata only

enums.description: Controlled exception lifecycle state
enums.semantic_notes: C-group frozen enum; lifecycle for controlled_exception_record; does not override L0 boundaries or dual-gate blockers.

system_actions.PENDING: hold release and require approval chain
system_actions.APPROVED: apply scoped restriction or limited allowance with audit
system_actions.ROLLED_BACK: revoke temporary allowance and restore default gates

decision_rules: exception_state never bypasses D-tier, dual-gate or release-gate blockers.
APPROVED requires approval chain completion, audit trail, and rollback_plan.
EXPIRED and ROLLED_BACK must trigger release re-evaluation and governance feedback.
mapping_notes: PENDING blocks release_gates and delivery_matrix exceptions until approval completes.
APPROVED allows only the approved scope and duration; other gates remain enforced.
REJECTED, ROLLED_BACK, EXPIRED reset to default governance rules.

example_cases.scenario: delivery_release exception approved for a single leadpack batch
example_cases.expected_effect: limited delivery allowed with audit; no external platform release

example_cases.scenario: coverage hold request rejected due to missing rollback_plan
example_cases.expected_effect: coverage rules unchanged; release remains blocked

example_cases.scenario: temporary contact restriction exception reaches effective_until
example_cases.expected_effect: contact release blocked again; audit record closed

Model usage scope
enums.semantic_notes: C-group frozen enum; defines model output usage boundary in model governance record; never authorizes external release or replaces formal gates.
decision_rules: model_usage_scope only declares allowable usage surfaces; it does not approve delivery or external release.
CLIENT_DELIVERY_ASSIST and EXTERNAL_ACTION_ASSIST require release_status = RELEASED and D12/D7 gate alignment.
model outputs must respect usable_scope and field policy dictionary before entering leadpack or external-facing bundles.
human review is mandatory for any model output that affects governance, delivery or external suggestion.
mapping_notes: INTERNAL_ASSIST -> internal analysis only; allows extraction/attribution/ranking suggestions; no leadpack delivery.
REVIEW_ASSIST -> review queue only; may generate review_request or governance_feedback_event; no client delivery.
CLIENT_DELIVERY_ASSIST -> leadpack summary/reference only; requires release_status RELEASED and usable_scope DELIVERY_REFERENCE.
EXTERNAL_ACTION_ASSIST -> outreach/action suggestions for internal operators; requires RELEASED and approvals; never auto-trigger external action.

example_cases.decision: allow summary reference with audit and masking
example_cases.expected_effect: summary only; no raw field exposure

Model governance release status
enums.semantic_notes: C-group frozen enum; governs model release eligibility across internal review and leadpack delivery; formal chain usage requires RELEASED and gate alignment.

actors: system for SUSPENDED on regression or gate failure

system_actions.INTERNAL_ONLY: restrict output to internal operations; block leadpack delivery
system_actions.REVIEW_ONLY: allow review queue only; require human approval for any downstream use
system_actions.RELEASED: allow use under release gates and approval chains; still subject to external block
system_actions.SUSPENDED: freeze delivery usage; trigger rollback and re-evaluation
system_actions.REVOKED: invalidate release; block all downstream usage and require incident record

decision_rules: RELEASED requires D11 regression PASS, release_gates PASS, and approval chain completion.
SUSPENDED is mandatory when gate failure, exception rollback, or boundary violation is detected.
REVOKED is mandatory for unauthorized release, D-tier boundary breach, or missing audit trail.
mapping_notes: INTERNAL_ONLY/REVIEW_ONLY align to INTERNAL_OPERABLE surfaces only; leadpack delivery remains blocked.
RELEASED allows leadpack delivery if delivery_matrix and field policy gates pass; external release remains blocked.
SUSPENDED forces downgrade to INTERNAL_ONLY until re-approved; gates reset to BLOCK.
REVOKED blocks all surfaces; requires new governance record to re-enter.

example_cases.expected_effect: review queue enabled; no leadpack exposure

example_cases.scenario: approval chain and gate checks complete for leadpack pilot
example_cases.expected_effect: leadpack summary allowed with audit; external release still blocked

example_cases.scenario: post-release regression detected in governance checks
example_cases.expected_effect: delivery halted, rollback initiated, status downgraded

Private supplement usable scope
enums.semantic_notes: C-group frozen enum; constrains who may consume governed supplement content; does not change release_status or release_layer by itself.
decision_rules: usable_scope only narrows consumption; it never expands release_layer or approval requirements.
DELIVERY_REFERENCE requires field policy and delivery matrix alignment before any leadpack use.
BLOCKED overrides any other allowance; content must be excluded from delivery bundles.
mapping_notes: REVIEW_ONLY -> internal review surfaces only; no sales or leadpack delivery.
GOVERNANCE_ONLY -> governance-only surfaces; may be used for exception evaluation.
DELIVERY_REFERENCE -> leadpack summary/reference allowed with masking and approvals.
BLOCKED -> no consumption; must be excluded from delivery, sales and external outputs.
